dashboard.label: ATT&CK Coverage Forge
dashboard.description: MITRE ATT&CK coverage posture maintained by the Aegis agent swarm. Rows are derived from the audit flight recorder: GAP = identified but undetected, COVERED = existing detection found, FORGED BY AEGIS = detection authored, governed and deployed by the agents.

search.query: index=aegis_audit sourcetype="aegis:flight_recorder" (action="gap_identified" OR action="technique_covered" OR action="rule_deployed") | eval technique_id=coalesce('detail.technique_id', 'detail.technique') | stats values(action) as actions latest(detail.technique_name) as technique_name latest(detail.tactic) as tactic by technique_id | eval status=case(isnotnull(mvfind(actions, "rule_deployed")), "FORGED BY AEGIS", isnotnull(mvfind(actions, "technique_covered")), "COVERED", true(), "GAP") | table technique_id, technique_name, tactic, status | sort technique_id
index=aegis_audit sourcetype="aegis:flight_recorder" action="rule_deployed" | eval forged_name=coalesce('detail.saved_search_name', 'detail.rule_id') | stats dc(forged_name) as forged

single.option: saved searches deployed by the agent swarm

panel.title: Weekly alert volume per rule: forecast vs observed

search.query: index=aegis_audit sourcetype="aegis:flight_recorder" (action="noise_forecast" OR action="verification") | eval rule=coalesce('detail.rule_id', "unknown") | eval series=if(action="noise_forecast", "forecast_weekly_alerts", "observed_weekly_alerts") | eval value=if(action="noise_forecast", 'detail.predicted_weekly_alerts', 'detail.observed_weekly_alerts') | chart latest(value) over rule by series
